summary:
I read the requirements, discovery notes, and open-questions artifacts from Define, then the step library from `input.json` (no `composition` object was present, so I proceeded with the default rule: include required templates and add conditional ones the task warrants).

This task is a substantial, guide-spanning feature — new query objects and services, cross-pipeline Turbo Stream broadcasts, and a new accessible modal flow layered on both the backend and UI style guides — so I included all conditional review critics: **Guide Alignment Critic** (heavy exposure to both mandatory guides), **Code Quality Critic** (new service/query-object structure), and **UI Test Critic** (new interactive modal, responsive/a11y requirements). Build is **Implementer → Test Critic**; Review is the four critics (each routing rework back to Implementer) followed by **Review Report Writer**. Output written to `output/workflow_plan.json`.
